name: Bethlehem First United Methodist Church
description: Come play pickleball at Bethlehem First United Methodist Church in Bethlehem, GA! There are 3 outdoor wood courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Brad Akins YMCA
description: Brad Akins YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Winder, GA. There are 7 hard and wood courts. 3 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights, locker rooms, restrooms, youth programming, and trainers or lessons. A membership is required to play.

name: Chateau Elan Winery Spa And Golf Resort
description: Chateau Elan Winery Spa And Golf Resort is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Braselton, GA. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and lights.

name: The Georgia Club
description: The Georgia Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Statham, GA. There are 4 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Victor Lord Park
description: Victor Lord Park is a place to play pickleball in Winder, GA. There are 15 asphalt courts. 12 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like youth programming and lights. The courts are free.
